Hi Michael,

I have received your confirmation and am thrilled that we have reached an agreement. I am pleased that we can finalize this deal at **$11,765**.

As mentioned, I will proceed with the title transfer documentation in accordance with CA DMV requirements at closing. Please let me know if you are available for the standard closing procedures or if you prefer to handle the paperwork directly.

Thank you for your patience and cooperation throughout this process.

Best regards,

Jon Clark Buyer Agent
